kind: slogan
title: Sylow subgroups are as big as arithmetic allows
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: slogan
Whatever power of $p$ divides the order, a subgroup of exactly that size exists,
and they are all conjugate.
:::
